info.title: JD.MSBuild.Fluent.Cli
info.description: CLI for generating MSBuild assets from JD.MSBuild.Fluent definitions.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: JD.MSBuild.Fluent CLI - generate MSBuild assets from fluent definitions

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate build/buildTransitive/Sdk assets from a definition factory method.

options.name: --assembly
options.description: Path to an assembly containing a factory method that returns PackageDefinition.

options.name: --type
options.description: Fully qualified type name containing the factory method.

options.name: --method
options.description: Factory method name (static, parameterless, returns PackageDefinition) [default: Create]

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for generated assets [default: artifacts/msbuild]

options.name: --example
options.description: Use an internal example definition (ignores --assembly/--type) [default: False]

commands.name: scaffold
commands.description: Convert MSBuild XML (.props/.targets) to fluent API C# code.

options.name: --xml
options.description: Path to MSBuild XML file (.props or .targets) to scaffold

options.name: --output
options.description: Output C# file path (default: DefinitionFactory.cs in current directory)

options.name: --package-id
options.description: Package ID for the definition (default: derived from filename)

options.name: --return-project
options.description: Generate factory returning MsBuildProject instead of PackageDefinition (for individual .props/.targets files) [default: False]
